title: Portfolio Website
shortDescription: Personal responsive portfolio built with vanilla JS; accessible and performance-focused.
longDescription: A hand-coded, accessible portfolio with progressive enhancement, animations, and a dynamic project showcase. Built to highlight projects, resume, and contact options with an emphasis on performance.

title: Deepfake Voice Detector
shortDescription: ML-powered app detecting voice deepfakes for Indian languages; research prototype.
longDescription: Research prototype that uses Wav2Vec2 and ECAPA-TDNN embeddings to detect deepfake audio with a web demo and model analysis.

title: Notes API (REST)
shortDescription: Lightweight REST API with JWT auth and PostgreSQL; deployed via Docker.
longDescription: A small RESTful microservice for note-taking with JWT authentication, testing, and Docker-based deployment for simple hosting.

title: UI Components Library
shortDescription: Reusable UI components and design tokens with Storybook for documentation.
longDescription: A curated set of accessible UI components with design tokens, responsive patterns, and Storybook docs for team use.

title: Energy Resource Solver
shortDescription: Academic research on allocation algorithms with simulation & visualization.
longDescription: Simulation framework and visual analysis for resource allocation algorithms in constrained networks. Includes plotting, benchmarks, and extensible modules.
